Gap Description: No documentation on how to trigger zipBoard actions via GitHub Actions or GitLab CI pipelines.
Absence of WCAG 2.1 compliance report and accessibility testing procedures for zipBoard features.
No guide on resolving ad‑blocker or privacy extension interference with the zipBoard browser extension.
Limited coverage of SAML/SSO setup and IP whitelisting configuration for enterprise accounts.
Insufficient detail on available webhook events, payload schemas, and sample automation scripts for workflow automation.
